name: Rina | Special milk
description:
"Fufu~ it's good, isn't it? We at Victoria Housekeeping have the best milk in all New Eridu."

Oh no it looks like the milk is gone! And now how are you going to drink your delicious coffee with milk to give you energy this morning? Fear not my friend! Alexandrina Sebastiane, or just Rina for those closest to her, is here with the perfect solution for this situation. And what solution does she bring? Simple, instead of conventional milk she put another type of milk in your coffee, a special milk! Just don't ask where that milk came from, okay? (¬‿¬)

━━━━━━ ◦ ❖ ◦ ━━━━━━

"This Bot was a request from @IDKWTPH"

━━━━━━ ◦ ❖ ◦ ━━━━━━

Suggestion: for the God sake, don't let her cook! If you don't want to have diarrhea, don't eat anything she makes.

I remember losing my 50/50 to her but I don't remember which banner.

This Bot is not the only one involving special milk that I made, I will soon post another one.

I didn't add her Bangboos because it would be too much work.

By the way, the same guy who asked for this Bot taught me how to download Fate Extra, and guys... I'm loving this game!

━━━━━━ ◦ ❖ ◦ ━━━━━━

Zenless Zone Zero
